_comment: 야담 채널용 그림체 카탈로그. prompt = 그림체 서술만 — 생성 시 공통 anchor(조선 문화·시대 잠금)와 negative가 뒤에 붙는다. 샘플 이미지는 같은 테스트 장면(_test_scene)으로 생성해 그림체만 비교 가능. 채널 확정 시 style.json preset에 '{prompt} + {anchor}'를 통째로 넣는다.
_test_scene: Scene: a weary salt peddler in his 40s wearing a worn white hanbok rests under an old zelkova tree at the edge of a village at dusk; his wooden A-frame carrier (jige) loaded with salt sacks leans beside him; thatched-roof houses, low stone walls, and misty mountains in the distance; warm evening light.
anchor: Set in the Joseon dynasty of old Korea; ALL people are Korean wearing traditional hanbok; Korean thatched-roof hanok houses, period-accurate Korean village; NOT Western, NOT European, NOT Japanese, NOT fantasy. Cinematic widescreen 16:9, high quality.
negative: No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark.

styles.name: soft-manhwa
styles.label: 부드러운 만화체 (현 채널 확정본)
styles.prompt: Korean folktale illustration, soft painterly Korean webtoon (manhwa) style, warm muted palette, beautiful refined faces, smooth luminous shading

styles.name: ink-wash
styles.label: 수묵담채
styles.prompt: Traditional Korean ink wash painting (sumukhwa) with delicate light color washes, expressive calligraphic brushstrokes, generous negative space, misty poetic atmosphere, hanji paper texture

styles.name: minhwa
styles.label: 민화
styles.prompt: Korean minhwa folk painting style, flat naive perspective, bold decorative outlines, vivid obangsaek five-color accents, ornamental clouds and trees, charming folk-art quality

styles.name: storybook-gouache
styles.label: 동화책 과슈
styles.prompt: Warm children's storybook illustration in gouache, soft rounded shapes, visible paper grain texture, cozy nostalgic mood, gentle diffused lighting

styles.name: dark-folklore
styles.label: 어두운 괴담체 (괴담 편 전용)
styles.prompt: Dark moody Korean folklore illustration, candlelit chiaroscuro, deep teal and umber shadows, eerie hushed atmosphere, painterly semi-realism, subtle fog

styles.name: retro-manhwa
styles.label: 레트로 70년대 만화
styles.prompt: Retro 1970s Korean comic book illustration, visible halftone dots, slightly faded aged-paper palette, bold confident ink linework, nostalgic print texture

styles.name: sageuk-cinematic
styles.label: 사극 시네마틱 (세미리얼)
styles.prompt: Semi-realistic cinematic digital painting like a Korean historical drama (sageuk) film still, natural skin tones, atmospheric haze and depth of field, golden hour rim lighting

styles.name: woodblock
styles.label: 목판화
styles.prompt: Korean woodblock print style, carved bold lines, limited earthy pigment palette of ochre, indigo and persimmon, rough paper texture, strong flat silhouettes

styles.name: watercolor-hanji
styles.label: 수채·한지
styles.prompt: Delicate watercolor painting on hanji paper, soft bleeding edges, luminous transparent washes, faint pencil underdrawing, airy nostalgic warmth

styles.name: cel-webtoon
styles.label: 모던 웹툰 셀채색
styles.prompt: Modern Korean webtoon cel-shading style, clean elegant line art, flat colors with crisp two-tone shadows, polished digital finish, refined character design
